reviews.comment:
El predio es muy amplio, arbolado y bonito. Pero está bastante descuidado. El ACA cobra una cuota importante a sus socios, que mereceríamos un lugar en mejores condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
The property is very spacious, wooded, and beautiful. But it's quite neglected. The ACA charges a significant fee to its members, and we deserve a place in better condition.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajamos por la Ruta 2 es parada obligada. Muy concurrido en verano pero muy tranquilo el resto del año. Buenas opciones de comida, baños en general limpios, aunque la culpa no es del personal ya que en temporada alta hay demasiada gente que no cuida y no dan a basto. Excelente arboleda con mesas y bancos para un descanso en el viaje. La vez que tuve un problema mecánico menor me lo solucionaron sin problema. Antes había una parrilla, pero después de la pandemia ya no está.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever we travel along Route 2, this is a must-stop. Very busy in the summer but very quiet the rest of the year. Good food options, and the restrooms are generally clean, although that's not the staff's fault since during peak season there are too many people who aren't careful and they can't keep up. Excellent grove with tables and benches for a rest during the trip. The time I had a minor mechanical problem, they fixed it without any issues. There used to be a grill, but it's gone now after the pandemic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNWZ5b3FRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Por playeros como el q me atendió recién no soy socio del ACA, pedí factura A y me dijo q no fue así, además de q me apuro con el pago porque no encontraba mi TC......una lastima q una entidad tan importante no este bien representada por algunas de sus empleados.....

(Translated by Google)
Because of gas station attendants like the one who just served me, I'm not an ACA member. I asked for an A-type invoice and he told me it wasn't valid, plus he rushed me to pay because he couldn't find my credit card... It's a shame that such an important organization isn't well represented by some of its employees...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMGVfUVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente estacion de mitad de camino, hace muchisimos años era del automovil club, sigue siendo igual de linda. Muy buena la atencion de los playeros

(Translated by Google)
Excellent midway station; it used to belong to the automobile club many years ago, and it's still just as lovely. The attendants are very helpful.
